evals.name: Generate basic guest checkout test
evals.description: Verify skill can generate a basic guest checkout E2E test with proper structure
evals.prompt: Using the checkout-test-development skill, generate an E2E test for: Guest user adds product to cart, navigates to checkout, fills contact info with email, enters shipping address, selects first shipping method, fills payment details, and completes order. Use TEST_PRODUCT_CATEGORIES.MENS_JACKETS. Include proper tags (@checkout, @guest-checkout, @place-order) and Feature/Scenario structure.
success_criteria: Test includes Feature() with @core and @checkout tags
Test includes Scenario() with @guest-checkout and @place-order tags
Uses addToCartFlow.executeAndNavigateToCheckout()
Uses checkoutPage methods (not direct I.* calls)
Uses generateTestEmail() for unique email generation
Includes expect() assertions for order number validation
Includes proper waits and timing (waitForOrderConfirmation)
No hardcoded test data (uses TEST_* constants)

evals.name: Generate billing address test
evals.description: Verify skill can generate a test with different billing address logic
evals.prompt: Generate an E2E test for: Registered shopper uses saved shipping address, then selects 'use different billing address', enters custom billing address, selects payment method, and completes order. Include: waitForUseDifferentBillingCheckbox, checkUseDifferentBillingAddress, fillBillingAddress, and verify billing address saved to account.
success_criteria: Includes loginFlow.execute() for registered user
Includes After() logout hook
Uses waitForUseDifferentBillingCheckbox() before interaction
Uses checkUseDifferentBillingAddress() async method
Uses fillBillingAddress() with custom address object
Includes account address verification after order
Uses proper tag (@registered-shopper, @billing-address)
Handles both prefilled and new address patterns

evals.name: Generate payment validation test
evals.description: Verify skill generates payment validation tests with error handling
evals.prompt: Generate a test that validates payment form error handling: Fill invalid card number, verify error appears, correct card number, verify error clears, successfully submit payment.
success_criteria: Uses INVALID_TEST_DATA.SHORT_CARD_NUMBER for invalid input
Fills invalid data and waits for validation errors
Uses proper error selectors or page object methods
Corrects invalid field with valid TEST_PAYMENT data
Verifies error clears after correction
Completes order successfully
Includes @payment-validation tag
Uses expect() for assertion validation

evals.name: Generate Storybook story for form component
evals.description: Verify skill can generate properly structured Storybook stories
evals.prompt: Generate a Storybook story for ContactForm component with variants: Empty (all fields blank), Filled (with valid data), Loading (spinning state), WithErrors (validation errors). Include Meta, argTypes, and Story definitions.
success_criteria: Includes Meta type definition with title and component
Includes tags: ['autodocs'] for auto-documentation
Defines argTypes with controls (boolean for isLoading, action for onSubmit)
Exports default meta
Exports type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>
Includes at least 4 story variants (Empty, Filled, Loading, WithErrors)
Each story has args with initial values
Uses realistic test data matching checkout context

evals.name: Provide debugging approach for timing issue
evals.description: Verify skill diagnoses and provides solutions for common timeout issues
evals.prompt: Debug: Test times out waiting for payment form after shipping method selection. Context: Contact info filled, shipping address entered, shipping method selected (index 0), then wait for payment form times out after 15 seconds. What are the likely causes and solutions?
success_criteria: Identifies shipping method not selected as potential cause
Identifies form state issues or re-renders
Suggests checking element selector in DOM
Recommends using expandPaymentStep() for prefilled data
Suggests increasing wait time to 20+ seconds
Recommends checking for overlay elements
Suggests scrollIntoView() if element off-screen
Provides concrete code examples for debugging

evals.name: Debug billing address checkbox not responding
evals.description: Verify skill diagnoses billing address toggle issues
evals.prompt: Billing address checkbox doesn't toggle. After clicking 'use different billing address', the form fields don't appear. What debugging steps should we take?
success_criteria: Recommends using page object method areBillingAddressFieldsVisible()
Suggests checking waitForUseDifferentBillingCheckbox() before interaction
Recommends verifying checkbox state with isUsingDifferentBillingAddress()
Suggests checking for CSS animation delays
Recommends DOM inspection to verify fields exist
Suggests checking form state synchronization
References proper timing patterns for form toggles

evals.name: Analyze checkout performance bottleneck
evals.description: Verify skill can identify performance issues and suggest optimizations
evals.prompt: Checkout performance: Page load 4.5s (target 3s), shipping API 2.3s (target 1s), payment form render 1.8s (target 500ms). Which is the critical bottleneck and what are optimization strategies?
success_criteria: Identifies shipping API as critical bottleneck (2.3s)
Suggests API caching as primary optimization
Suggests CDN for static shipping rate data
Recommends request batching or optimization
Identifies payment form rendering as secondary issue
Suggests component memoization or lazy validation
Recommends monitoring network vs rendering separately
Suggests establishing baseline metrics before optimization

evals.name: Verify skill preconditions are met
evals.description: Verify skill checks all required preconditions before proceeding
evals.prompt: I'm in the storefront-next project. Can I use the checkout-test-development skill?
success_criteria: Confirms user is in correct project (template-retail-rsc-app/e2e)
Checks for required files (checkout.page.ts, checkout.data.ts)
Verifies test environment setup (CodeceptJS, Playwright)
Provides guidance if preconditions not met
Offers setup instructions if missing dependencies

evals.name: Generate data-driven multi-currency test
evals.description: Verify skill generates data-driven tests for multiple currencies
evals.prompt: Generate a data-driven test that runs checkout in multiple currencies (USD and GBP). Use TEST_LOCALE_CURRENCIES from test data. Test should verify currency symbol on order summary and confirmation page.
success_criteria: Uses TEST_LOCALE_CURRENCIES array for data-driven iteration
Uses for...of loop or data loop pattern
Generates test name with currency label
Uses sitePrefix option with locale/site info
Verifies currency pattern with regex (not hardcoded symbol)
Checks currency on both order summary and confirmation
Includes proper tags (@multi-currency and specific currency)
Uses locale-specific shipping address for each currency

evals.name: Verify proper page object method usage
evals.description: Verify skill recommends and uses page object methods correctly
evals.prompt: What are the key checkout page object methods and when should they be used instead of direct I.* calls?
success_criteria: Lists completeCheckout() for happy-path tests
Lists fillContactInfo(), fillShippingAddress(), selectShippingMethod()
Lists checkUseDifferentBillingAddress(), fillBillingAddress()
Lists fillPaymentInfo() vs fillPaymentFieldsOnly()
Explains never using direct I.* calls in test scenarios
Explains advantage of page object abstraction
Recommends review of checkout.page.ts for available methods
Shows proper usage patterns in code examples

evals.name: Demonstrate proper test data usage
evals.description: Verify skill uses proper test data constants
evals.prompt: Show proper test data usage patterns for checkout testing. What constants are available?
success_criteria: References TEST_SHIPPING_ADDRESS constant
References TEST_PAYMENT constant
References TEST_PRODUCT_CATEGORIES object
References TEST_LOCALE_CURRENCIES for multi-currency
References INVALID_TEST_DATA for error testing
Shows generateTestEmail() for unique email generation
Imports from e2e/src/test-data/checkout.data.ts
Explains advantage of centralized test data

metadata.notes: Evals test skill's ability to generate checkout tests, debug issues, create Storybook stories, and provide performance guidance. All evals in en-US locale per skill requirements.
